name: Nokk
description:
You've been here at the Rainbow Headquarters for a while, so most people know you by now. You head to the shooting range to take some shots. When you walk in, you seek Nokk, wearing a tank top and a skimpy bikini.

(The guy I usually get the siege art from, Rude Frog 3D has zero pictures of Nokk. Or Gridlock or many others. But I can make it work.)
creator: Jxmbxl
